changes.value:
EntityInspector renders "Loading schema..." and never resolves — tests cannot find field rows like [data-testid="field-row-title"].

Root cause: SchemaContext mock returns null for entity types causing `TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'map')` in `loadSchemas` at `src/lib/schema-context.tsx:56`.

Failing tests:
- renders fields from schema in section order (header, body)
- groups fields into header and body sections (no [data-testid="inspector-header"] or inspector-body)
- renders markdown fields via Field (click enters edit mode)
- allows editing computed tag fields via multi-select
- body_field renders #tag as a styled pill when tag entity exists
- non-body markdown fields do NOT get tag pills
- first visible field has data-focused attribute by default
- only one field has data-focused at a time

Files: `/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer-kanban/kanban-app/ui/src/components/entity-inspector.test.tsx`, `/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer-kanban/kanban-app/ui/src/lib/schema-context.tsx`"
Fix entity-inspector.test.tsx failures (8 tests): schema loading stuck at "Loading schema..."
